nodes.text: Date of birth? February ninth, seventy-nine. I only remember it so clearly because one of my students shares the same birthday and she makes a cake every year. It's very sweet.

responses.text: Can you confirm the full year?

nodes.text: Nineteen seventy-nine. February ninth. The year I have feelings about is the one coming up, not the one on the ID.
Wonderful. See — even in a bad week, some things still work out.
